LanguageData.ABY_IncidentBreachLeakLetterText_ImpsOnl: The abyssal summoning circle has destabilized local space. {0} breach portal(s) have opened on the current map, and an estimated {1} rift imp(s) are spilling through the tears.
LanguageData.ABY_IncidentBreachLeakLetterText_WithHou: The abyssal summoning circle has destabilized local space. {0} breach portal(s) have opened on the current map, and an estimated {1} rift imp(s) with {2} ember hound(s) are forcing their way through behind them.
